a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.presenceSensor: Returns true if an obstacle is detected in front of the sensor and false otherwise
a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.rgb: Converts red, green, blue channels into a RGB color
a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.rgb|param|blue: value of the blue channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.rgb|param|green: value of the green channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.rgb|param|red: value of the red channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.setRingColor: Turns on the led in chosen color
a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.barrier: Opens or closes the barrier setting servo angle at 5° or 115°
a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.barrier|param|act: open=servo angle at 115° and close=servo angle at 5°
a4-microSySTEM-Barrier.setServoAngle: Sets servo angle which allows to control the barrier
